Home / Service Areas / Hernando

Auto-repair in Hernando, MS

Trusted local professionals serving Hernando and surrounding communities

Serving Hernando, MS

Onyx Auto Repair provides dependable auto service to Hernando residents in DeSoto County. As the county seat, Hernando sees plenty of daily traffic, and we're here to keep local vehicles in top condition. Our technicians are skilled in everything from basic maintenance to complex engine repairs. We understand Hernando drivers value both quality service and small-town hospitality. That's why we take the time to get to know our customers and their vehicles, offering personalized recommendations to extend vehicle life and improve performance on Hernando's roads.

Hernando maintains historic charm as DeSoto County's oldest city while experiencing modern growth.

Auto-repair Services in Hernando

Brake Repair

Complete brake inspections and repairs for Memphis drivers

Engine Diagnostics

Advanced troubleshooting for check engine lights

AC Repair

Cooling system repairs for Memphis summers

Learn more →

Transmission Service

Fluid services and repairs for automatic transmissions

Learn more →

Suspension Repair

Shocks, struts, and alignment services

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Hernando and the surrounding area.
